title: knesebeckia bulbillifera
intro: Knesebeckia bulbillifera is a type of flowering plant, also known as Chinese waxflower, belonging to the family Rutaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Knesebeckia bulbillifera include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and sore throats, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Knesebeckia bulbillifera include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and other remedies.
